allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Recurse src | Where-Object { -not $_.PSIsContainer } | Select-Object FullName, Length)
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Recurse scripts, netlify, supabase | Where-Object { -not $_.PSIsContainer } | Select-Object FullName)

PowerShell($models = \(Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/models'\).data; $models | Where-Object { $_.id -match '^\(anthropic|openai|google|x-ai|perplexity\)/' } | Sort-Object created -Descending | Select-Object -First 40 id, name | Format-Table -AutoSize)
PowerShell($models = \(Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/models'\).data; $models | Where-Object { $_.id -match '^perplexity/' } | Select-Object id, name | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:5173/' -UseBasicParsing; "HOME: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; if \($r.Content -match 'Tag who wrote what|Daily battle'\) { "homepage game copy: OK" }; $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:5173/leaderboard' -UseBasicParsing; "LEADERBOARD: $\($r2.StatusCode\)"; $r3 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:5173/faq' -UseBasicParsing; "FAQ: $\($r3.StatusCode\)")

PowerShell($body = @{ battle_id = '75cf873a-1fc2-4afb-814a-4b9a01ae3c33'; fingerprint = 'claude-e2e-test-delete-me'; favorite = 'A'; guesses = @{ A='claude'; B='chatgpt'; C='gemini'; D='grok'; E='perplexity' } } | ConvertTo-Json; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:5173/api/vote' -Method POST -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $body -UseBasicParsing; "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $r.Content)

PowerShell($env_lines = Get-Content .env; $url = \($env_lines | Where-Object { $_ -match '^PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL=' }\) -replace '^PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL=',''; $key = \($env_lines | Where-Object { $_ -match '^PRIVATE_SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY=' }\) -replace '^PRIVATE_SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY=',''; $h = @{ apikey = $key; Authorization = "Bearer $key" }; $check = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "$url/rest/v1/votes?fingerprint=eq.claude-e2e-test-delete-me&select=id,choice" -Headers $h; "test votes found: $\($check.Count\)"; if \($check.Count -gt 0\) { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "$url/rest/v1/votes?fingerprint=eq.claude-e2e-test-delete-me" -Method DELETE -Headers $h; "deleted" })

PowerShell($body = @{ battle_id = '75cf873a-1fc2-4afb-814a-4b9a01ae3c33'; fingerprint = 'claude-e2e-test-delete-me-2'; favorite = 'B'; guesses = @{ A='grok'; B='chatgpt'; C='claude'; D='perplexity'; E='gemini' } } | ConvertTo-Json; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:5173/api/vote' -Method POST -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $body -UseBasicParsing; "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $r.Content)

PowerShell($env_lines = Get-Content .env; $url = \($env_lines | Where-Object { $_ -match '^PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL=' }\) -replace '^PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL=',''; $key = \($env_lines | Where-Object { $_ -match '^PRIVATE_SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY=' }\) -replace '^PRIVATE_SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY=',''; $h = @{ apikey = $key; Authorization = "Bearer $key" }; Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "$url/rest/v1/votes?fingerprint=eq.claude-e2e-test-delete-me-2" -Method DELETE -Headers $h; "test vote deleted")

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://guessthemodel.netlify.app/' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; if \($r.Content -match 'AIs\\. Tag who wrote what|Lock it in'\) { "NEW UI LIVE on netlify.app" } elseif \($r.Content -match 'GuessTheModel'\) { "app found but OLD UI" } else { "unknown site" } } catch { "not reachable: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
PowerShell(if \(Test-Path .claude\\skills\) { Get-ChildItem .claude\\skills } else { "no .claude/skills dir" }; "---"; npx playwright --version 2>$null; "playwright exit: $LASTEXITCODE")
PowerShell(Test-Path node_modules\\playwright; Test-Path node_modules\\playwright-core; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\ms-playwright" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 6 Name)

PowerShell($d = "$env:TEMP\\gtm-verify"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force $d | Out-Null; Set-Location $d; npm init -y 2>$null | Out-Null; npm i playwright@1.60.0 --no-audit --no-fund 2>$null | Select-Object -Last 2; Set-Location c:\\Users\\mverhill\\Documents\\guess; "installed")
PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; Set-Location $env:TEMP\\gtm-verify; node drive.mjs; Set-Location c:\\Users\\mverhill\\Documents\\guess)

PowerShell($env_lines = Get-Content .env; $url = \($env_lines | Where-Object { $_ -match '^PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL=' }\) -replace '^PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL=',''; $key = \($env_lines | Where-Object { $_ -match '^PRIVATE_SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY=' }\) -replace '^PRIVATE_SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY=',''; $h = @{ apikey = $key; Authorization = "Bearer $key" }; \(Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "$url/rest/v1/battles?select=category" -Headers $h\) | Group-Object category | Select-Object Name, Count | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($body = @{ battle_id = '75cf873a-1fc2-4afb-814a-4b9a01ae3c33'; fingerprint = 'claude-verify-v3-delete-me'; favorite = 'A' } | ConvertTo-Json; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:5173/api/crown' -Method POST -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $body -UseBasicParsing; "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $r.Content } catch { "FAILED: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode\) "; $_.ErrorDetails.Message })

PowerShell($env_lines = Get-Content .env; $url = \($env_lines | Where-Object { $_ -match '^PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL=' }\) -replace '^PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL=',''; $key = \($env_lines | Where-Object { $_ -match '^PRIVATE_SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY=' }\) -replace '^PRIVATE_SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY=',''; $h = @{ apikey = $key; Authorization = "Bearer $key" }; Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "$url/rest/v1/votes?fingerprint=eq.claude-verify-v3-delete-me&select=battle_id,choice,score" -Headers $h | ConvertTo-Json; "---today's daily---"; Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "$url/rest/v1/battles?is_daily=eq.true&order=battle_date.desc&limit=2&select=id,battle_date,prompt" -Headers $h | ConvertTo-Json)

PowerShell($body = @{ battle_id = 'f6ee8838-f6b7-431b-afc2-a8623c1d9da7'; fingerprint = 'claude-verify-v3-delete-me'; favorite = 'A' } | ConvertTo-Json; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:5173/api/crown' -Method POST -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $body -UseBasicParsing; "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $r.Content.Substring\(0,300\))
PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:5173/' -UseBasicParsing; if \($r.Content -match 'heartfelt'\) { "homepage shows roast battle: OK" } else { "MISSING" })

PowerShell($env_lines = Get-Content .env; $url = \($env_lines | Where-Object { $_ -match '^PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL=' }\) -replace '^PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL=',''; $key = \($env_lines | Where-Object { $_ -match '^PRIVATE_SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY=' }\) -replace '^PRIVATE_SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY=',''; $h = @{ apikey = $key; Authorization = "Bearer $key" }; try { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "$url/rest/v1/decks?select=id&limit=1" -Headers $h | Out-Null; "MIGRATION 006 \(decks\): APPLIED" } catch { "MIGRATION 006 \(decks\): NOT APPLIED" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:5173/' -UseBasicParsing; "HOME: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; if \($r.Content -match 'which AI wrote it'\) { "fallback \(battle main\): OK" }; if \($r.Content -match "what's human"\) { "deck UI present \(unexpected\)" })
